rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §29.0163, which addresses tolling of statute of limitations for military families in special education due process hearings.
quote: The agency must include in the notice of procedural safeguards that the statute of limitations for the parent of a student to request an impartial due process hearing under 20 U.S.C. Section 1415(b) may be tolled if the parent is an active-duty servicemember and 50 U.S.C. Section 3936 applies to the parent.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code homestead exemption change and this education statute regarding military families with disabled children.
